description_long: This is a faceted, polygonal bottle with a pinkish-red hue and a decorative printed label featuring a cartoon character with a flower on its head, visible on the front. The bottle has a tall, narrow neck and a wide, octagonal base, tapering upward to a metallic-looking cap secured by a wire bail closure. The body of the bottle is semi-transparent, allowing a faint view of the liquid contents inside, which appear to be pink. The label wraps around the bottle, with text and additional graphics visible on the sides and back, though they are somewhat blurred. The cap is a deep red metallic color, and the wire mechanism is silver, suggesting a secure, resealable closure. The overall design is playful and modern, likely intended for beverages such as specialty sodas or juices.
description: A pink, semi-transparent bottle with a cartoon character label, metallic red cap, and wire bail closure, containing visible pink liquid.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cartoon character label and the full shape of the bottle, with the cap and closure mechanism clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the edge of the label, some text, and the wire closure, with less detail of the character.
description_view_2: Back view displays mostly text and graphics on the label, with the pink liquid visible through the translucent body.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite edge of the label and the wire closure, with minimal label detail.
attribute_label_or_branding: Decorative label with a cartoon character (white with a flower on its head) on the front, pink background, and some blurred text and graphics wrapping around the bottle.
